claims.description: Package validation, packing, and publish readiness derive a dependency-ordered publish graph and fail on cycles or missing internal package dependencies.

claims.description: Client UI settings persist through localStorage and IndexedDB-backed settings storage, including session restore and diagnostics toggles.

claims.description: Browser/PWA projects use IndexedDB content while desktop filesystem projects keep file content on the mounted filesystem and retain settings/git configuration in IndexedDB.

claims.description: Storage backend details appear only when persistence diagnostics are enabled and remain absent from the normal status footer.

claims.description: The client persistence boundary rejects cloud persistence backends and reports cloud persistence as out of bounds in diagnostics.
claims.title: Cloud persistence remains out of bounds

claims.description: Header settings icon spacing, action rail icon mappings, view toolbar scrolling, command palette responsiveness, iconized compaction, and the Anodized Billet default theme are implemented and guarded by focused client tests.

issues.description: MdWrk.com light and dark themes define syntax color variables and Prism/HLJS token selectors in apps/mdwrkcom/styles/markdown-renderer.css, but @mdwrk/markdown-renderer-core renders fenced code as escaped plain text inside pre/code with only a language-* class. @mdwrk/markdown-renderer-react accepts syntaxTheme but currently ignores it, so no tokenizer emits .token.* or .hljs-* spans. The uniform code color rule then makes docs and blog code blocks render monochrome even when a language is present.
issues.title: Lander code blocks do not render syntax-colored tokens

issues.description: Deleting all plaintext markdown in the edit-in-renderer package must be allowed. Empty plaintext is a valid blank Markdown document and must render to an empty projection; placeholder text must never become source or rendered document content.
issues.title: Edit-in-renderer cannot delete to blank document

issues.description: Double-Enter and triple-Enter edits in the edit-in-renderer package must preserve plaintext newline runs, caret offset, and a corresponding rendered blank-line area. The rendered projection must be derived from plaintext and must not collapse trailing blank source lines in a way that breaks editing.
issues.title: Edit-in-renderer repeated Enter breaks blank-line editing

issues.description: Static mdwrkcom article navigation emits HTML with data-lander-theme=lander-light, incomplete dark critical CSS variables, and a deferred stylesheet path. When a user has lander-dark stored, full-document navigation can briefly paint light shell and theme-toggle chrome before the bootstrap and full stylesheet converge to dark.
issues.title: MdWrkcom static pages flash light theme before dark first paint
